title: primula sessiliflora
intro: Primula sessiliflora, also known as the Sessile-leaved Primrose or Sessile Primrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The medicinal properties of Primula sessiliflora also provide health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the relief of digestive issues. Primula sessiliflora is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice or compress to apply directly to affected areas.
